name: contrivox
description: Contrivox development plugin — contract analysis SaaS. Bundles CLAUDE.md, skills, hooks, and subagents for the full team.
author: Contrivox Engineering

constitution.description: Contrivox agent constitution — security rules, conventions, anti-patterns, DB schema reference

skills.name: contract-analysis
skills.description: Claude API integration for multilingual contract analysis — prompt engineering, Zod validation, error handling

skills.name: pdf-generation
skills.description: Branded Contrivox PDF report generation with jsPDF — layout, colours, download, base64 for email

skills.name: email-delivery
skills.description: Transactional email with Resend — branded HTML template, PDF attachment, WhatsApp deep link, rate limiting

hooks.description: Blocks dangerous commands — rm -rf, force push, secret writing, pipe-to-shell, migration overwrite
Audit logging, secret scanning in output, TypeScript auto-check, .env gitignore guard

subagents.name: code-reviewer
subagents.description: Security and quality code review — checklist-based, returns structured verdict in one message
subagents.invocation: Run the code reviewer on [file or diff]

subagents.name: migration-generator
subagents.description: Generates safe, RLS-enabled, idempotent Supabase SQL migrations following Contrivox schema conventions

subagents.name: security-auditor
subagents.description: Full security audit by scope — API, auth, payments, file upload, data access. Returns severity-classified report
subagents.invocation: Run security audit on [full | api | auth | payments]

changes: Full CLAUDE.md constitution with security rules
